loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy consumption for the last 7 days — per-phase breakdown and reactive energy are derived from total input power; subsidy and target metrics are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active power (kW) — reactive power (kVAr) is not measured for this UPS asset.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; output_active_power_total_kw has no data (N), so loss/efficiency are derived from available input power only.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load factor — expected load, range, and anomaly counts are not measured by this meter.
